6 int a irq 11 on pci0.19.0

12
May 12 10:44:32 atmtest-pc20 /kernel: lnc1: Missed packet -- no receive buffer

May 12 10:44:32 atmtest-pc20 /kernel: lnc1: Device timeout -- Resetting

How-To-Repeat: Problem happens upon bootup.
